race.comment: BANCOORA (1) has won just two of 15 but does have really good form for this. Freshened for the sharper trip and is a winner this journey. Looks hard to beat this line-up. SYMPHONITE (8) has been edging towards a win, the latest runner-up at Ararat. Has been winding up strongly and looks one of the better chances. FOXY HEART (3) was back in form with a strong win last time and is in the mix again on that run. KING ALLA (9) has run well course and distance and looks next best.
